message:
fix: harden URL sanitization, watch reindex error handling, and update check cadence

Extend markdown URL sanitization to image tags and control-character obfuscation variants; refactor watch reindex error path into finalize_watch_reindex_result to surface errors and reset progress state; deduplicate build_update_info across async/sync paths and guard against clock skew in should_check; bump frankensearch rev 472322f→3eec663.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
